SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.processmodel.dexpi

Class NorsokLineNumber

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.processmodel.dexpi.NorsokLineNumber
final class NorsokLineNumber extends Object
Composes a complete pipe line-identification number following the NORSOK Z-003 / PIP PIC001 convention.

The full line number concatenates the nominal size, fluid (service) code, a sequential line number, the piping (material) class and an optional insulation code, separated by hyphens: 

   SIZE"-FLUIDCODE-SEQUENCE-PIPINGCLASS[-INSULATION]
   e.g.  6"-PG-1001-A1B-H25

where H25 denotes 25 mm of heat-conservation insulation. Empty or missing fields are omitted so a partially specified line still produces a sensible identifier.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

  • Field Details

    • size

      private String size
      Nominal pipe size including the inch double-quote, e.g. 6".

    • fluidCode

      private String fluidCode
      Fluid / service code, e.g. PG (process gas).

    • sequence

      private String sequence
      Sequential line number, e.g. 1001.

    • pipingClass

      private String pipingClass
      Piping (material) class, e.g. A1B.

    • insulation

      private String insulation
      Optional insulation code, e.g. H25 or PP.

  • Constructor Details

    • NorsokLineNumber

      NorsokLineNumber()
      Creates an empty line-number builder.

  • Method Details

    • size

      NorsokLineNumber size(String sizeValue)
      Sets the nominal pipe size. A bare number is suffixed with the inch mark.
      Parameters:
      sizeValue - nominal size such as "6" or "6\"" (may be null)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • fluidCode

      NorsokLineNumber fluidCode(String code)
      Sets the fluid / service code.
      Parameters:
      code - fluid code such as "PG" or "HC" (may be null)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • sequence

      NorsokLineNumber sequence(String seq)
      Sets the sequential line number.
      Parameters:
      seq - sequence such as "1001" (may be null)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • pipingClass

      NorsokLineNumber pipingClass(String clazz)
      Sets the piping (material) class.
      Parameters:
      clazz - piping class such as "A1B" or "150#" (may be null)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • insulation

      NorsokLineNumber insulation(String code)
      Sets the insulation code.
      Parameters:
      code - insulation code such as "H25" (heat conservation) or "PP" (personnel protection) (may be null)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      String build()
      Builds the complete hyphen-separated line number, omitting empty fields.
      Returns:
      the composed line number (never null; empty string if no fields are set)

    • appendField

      private static void appendField(StringBuilder sb, String field)
      Appends a field with a leading hyphen when the builder already has content.
      Parameters:
      sb - the target buffer
      field - the field value (skipped when null)

    • trimToNull

      private static String trimToNull(String value)
      Trims a string, returning null when the result is empty.
      Parameters:
      value - the input (may be null)
      Returns:
      the trimmed value, or null when blank
